context.description: Create all new Supabase DB migrations required for the platform monetization infrastructure. This is the foundational task - all other tasks depend on these schemas.
acceptance_criteria: Migration 1: subscription_tier ENUM (free/premium) added to profiles table with croa_disclosure_accepted BOOLEAN DEFAULT false and croa_disclosure_timestamp TIMESTAMPTZ columns

Migration 2: payments table created (id UUID, user_id UUID FK profiles, stripe_payment_intent_id TEXT UNIQUE, amount_cents INTEGER, net_revenue_cents INTEGER GENERATED, status payment_status ENUM, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ) with RLS policy (user sees own rows only)
Migration 3: stripe_webhook_events table (id UUID, stripe_event_id TEXT UNIQUE, event_type TEXT, processed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, payload JSONB) with RLS admin-only

Migration 4: notification_log table (id UUID, user_id UUID FK, notification_type TEXT CHECK IN ('croa_disclosure','letter_sent','mailing_dispatched','fcra_day1','fcra_day3','fcra_day25','dispute_update'), sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ, metadata JSONB) with RLS user-owns
Migration 5: user_analytics TABLE with trigger (fires on INSERT/UPDATE to tradelines, disputes - increments total_scans, total_letters, total_mailings counters per user_id)

Migration 6: status_history table (id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), dispute_id UUID REFERENCES disputes(id), tradeline_id UUID REFERENCES tradelines(id), old_status TEXT, new_status TEXT, changed_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), changed_by UUID REFERENCES profiles(id)) with RLS user-owns via dispute_id join
Migration 7: from_address fields added to profiles table (from_address_line1 TEXT, from_address_line2 TEXT, from_address_city TEXT, from_address_state TEXT, from_address_zip TEXT)
All migrations are idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS / CREATE OR REPLACE)
All tables have RLS enabled with appropriate policies matching existing tradelines pattern
Verify with: SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname='public' to confirm all 6 new tables/columns exist
implementation_approach: Step 1: Read existing migration 20250720_update_tradeline_unique_constraint.sql to understand RLS policy pattern
Step 2: Read docs/PRD-Data-Architecture.md sections on payments, notifications, and analytics schemas
Step 6: Create supabase/migrations/YYYYMMDD_user_analytics_trigger.sql - user_analytics table + trigger function
Step 7: Create supabase/migrations/YYYYMMDD_status_history.sql - status_history table with RLS
Step 8: Create supabase/migrations/YYYYMMDD_profiles_address_fields.sql - ADD COLUMN from_address_* to profiles
Use timestamp prefix format matching existing migrations (YYYYMMDD_description.sql)
pre_analysis: Read docs/PRD-Data-Architecture.md for exact schema specifications
